name: Hill & Smith PLC
description: International infrastructure products manufacturer: galvanizing, engineered steel/composite solutions, and road/security products. 59% US revenue, 76% US operating profit. Expanding margins toward 18%+ target.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £855m in FY2024 (+3%). Structural US infrastructure growth (electrical grid, data centres, roads). US = 59% of revenue. M&A pipeline ~£50-70m pa.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin 16.8% in FY2024 (up from 14.8%). Target 18%+ through cycle. Galvanizing at 25.4% margin. Portfolio reshaping toward higher-margin US businesses.
assumptions.risks: UK market weakness, US tariff/trade uncertainty, FX exposure (59% US revenue), acquisition integration risk, off-grid solar lighting demand volatility.
assumptions.catalyst: US electrical grid investment (10-20 year tailwind), IIJA spending, data centre construction, continued bolt-on M&A, ROIC target 22%+.
